fixtureScenarios.name: sparse_map_no_cluster_warning
fixtureScenarios.intent: Levels are far enough apart that current audit clustering reports no clustered areas.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Sparse maps do not emit clustered_level_areas_present.

fixtureScenarios.name: support_only_cluster
fixtureScenarios.intent: Several support rows sit within the configured audit cluster threshold.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Audit reports a support cluster and preserves surfaced level arrays.

fixtureScenarios.name: resistance_only_cluster
fixtureScenarios.intent: Several resistance rows sit within the configured audit cluster threshold.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Audit reports a resistance cluster and preserves surfaced level arrays.

fixtureScenarios.name: mixed_cluster
fixtureScenarios.intent: Support and resistance rows sit near one another around the reference price.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Audit reports a mixed cluster without reclassifying support or resistance sides.

fixtureScenarios.name: dense_clustered_map
fixtureScenarios.intent: Multiple rows sit inside the configured cluster threshold.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Diagnostic semantics classify clustered_level_areas_present as density, and current anchor-based clustering captures five rows in this fixture.

fixtureScenarios.name: large_separated_map
fixtureScenarios.intent: Many rows are present but separated enough to avoid current audit cluster detection.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Dense review cases can exist without clustered_level_areas_present when rows are not inside the audit threshold.

fixtureScenarios.name: nearest_level_preservation
fixtureScenarios.intent: Nearby clusters are audited while nearest support and resistance identities remain stable.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Audit diagnostics do not mutate the supplied LevelEngineOutput or change nearest level identity.
